title: Produce the M2 work logistics vertical slice plan
summary: Create the reviewed M2 plan and task DAG for the work/logistics vertical slice defined by WM-0030-m2-entry-prompt.md. This is a planning/control task only: it must define allowed and forbidden paths, dependencies, acceptance criteria, required checks, benchmark impact, review routing, rollback model and owner gates before any M2 implementation starts.
acceptance: Plan contains an acyclic M2 task DAG starting with planning and excluding M3
Every M2 task packet lists objective allowed paths forbidden paths dependencies owner reviewer acceptance required checks benchmark impact review routing rollback model and Spark eligibility
Plan preserves Worker/headless authority sim-core purity bounded indexed work selection serializable jobs structured reasons save/replay and parity gates

Scope stays inside work/logistics vertical slice and excludes broad economy town-life anomaly combat platform save UI content expansion and balance production unless explicitly justified as scaffolding
No implementation branch is started by WM-0032
Owner gates and independent reviewer verification pass

history.details: WM-0031 is done; M2 entry prompt requires a reviewed planning task before implementation.
